title: Functions should have return type annotations
description: Using return type annotations helps to understand the purpose and expected return value of functions.
message: Missing return type annotation for function.
recommendation: Add a return type annotation for the function.

noncompliant.description: A function without a return type annotation.

compliant.description: A function with a valid return type annotation.

why_is_this_an_issue: Return type annotations help to understand the purpose and expected return value of functions, making code more readable and maintainable.
how_to_fix: Add a return type annotation to the function.

metadata.title: Functions should have return type annotations
